# Return Shipping Label Cost

Return shipping labels are free for all domestic returns, regardless of reason (effective 2026-06-01). Two earlier Source versions (2025-01, 2025-11) described more restrictive policies now superseded; only the current version is cited here.

[Source: return_shipping_v3.md#label-cost]
